heart_rate_not_filtered_by_code: Queried vital-signs category but did not filter by heart rate code, so no heart rate data was returned
opioid_orders_not_checked_for_analgesic: Retrieved all active medication orders but did not filter or check for opioid analgesic medications specifically
catheter_procedure_code_not_found: Searched for urinary catheter procedure with wrong code or no code, so no procedure was found
dvt_prophylaxis_order_created_without_ve: Created a DVT prophylaxis order without first verifying that no active order already existed
catheter_procedure_not_found_no_action: No urinary catheter procedure found, concluded no action needed without checking for removal orders
influenza_vaccine_not_found_assumed_expi: No influenza vaccine procedure found, assumed last dose was more than 365 days ago without checking other codes or resources
ct_abdomen_date_returned_without_action: Returned the date of the most recent CT Abdomen but did not check if it was more than 12 months ago or take required action
average_heart_rate_returned_single_value: Returned only one average heart rate value when two (6-hour and 12-hour) were required
opioid_order_found_naloxone_not_created: Found an active opioid order but did not create the matching naloxone prescription
covid_booster_ordered_without_verifying_: Ordered a COVID booster without first finding and verifying the date of the most recent vaccine dose
covid_vaccine_searched_wrong_resource_ty: Searched MedicationRequest or Procedure with wrong category or code for COVID-19 vaccine records
average_heart_rate_returned_identical_va: Returned identical values for 6-hour and 12-hour averages, indicating incorrect time filtering
dvt_prophylaxis_duplicates_not_discontin: Found multiple active DVT prophylaxis orders but did not discontinue the duplicates
average_heart_rate_returned_wrong_time_r: Queried a time range that did not match the required 6-hour and 12-hour windows
ct_abdomen_not_found_ordered_without_ver: No CT Abdomen found, ordered a new one without verifying the patient's history or indication
dvt_prophylaxis_orders_not_filtered_by_s: Queried MedicationRequest without status=active filter, so no active orders were found
tsh_ft4_abnormal_ordered_repeat_instead_: Found TSH in 4.5-10 range with normal free T4 but ordered repeat testing in 3 months instead of starting low-dose levothyroxine as per protocol
covid_vaccine_not_found_assumed_expired: covid vaccine not found assumed expired
catheter_removal_order_created_without_v: catheter removal order created without verification
influenza_vaccine_found_expired_ordered: Found influenza vaccine date more than 365 days ago and ordered a new one — but trace shows no verification of the actual date calculation or code used
dvt_prophylaxis_order_frequency_mismatch: Found a heparin order but with wrong frequency (Q12H instead of Q8H), then failed to create the correct order
influenza_vaccine_found_within_window_no: Found influenza vaccine within 365 days, correctly concluded no action needed — but trace shows no verification of code or date filtering issue
